question_text: A ball is thrown upwards into the air. Which of the following correctly describes the energy transformation as the ball rises?

options.label: A
options.text: Kinetic energy increases and gravitational potential energy decreases

options.label: B
options.text: Kinetic energy decreases and gravitational potential energy increases

options.label: C
options.text: Both kinetic energy and gravitational potential energy increase

explanation: As a ball rises upwards, it slows down, so its kinetic energy (energy of movement) decreases. At the same time, it gets higher, so its gravitational potential energy (energy due to position) increases. The total energy stays the same overall.
